prompt: What should a 15-year-old do to gain muscle and strength: exercise selection, weekly volume, reps/intensity/failure, and calories/macros?
assertions: Recommends compound movement patterns (squat, press, hinge, row variants)
Provides a starting volume recommendation (approximately 8-12 sets per muscle per week)
Recommends training mostly in the 5-12 rep range
Addresses proximity to failure (most work at 0-2 RIR or close to failure)
Provides nutrition guidance: slow gain target (~1% bodyweight per month) and protein target (~1.5-2.0 g/kg/day)
Recommends 3-5 training sessions per week (or mentions 2 can work for beginners)
Mentions importance of bodyweight/movement competency before heavy barbell loading
